memoryArtifacts.headline: Memorial
memoryArtifacts.description:
Biography
Eleanor Washbourne was born at Washbourne*, Worcestershire, England.[1]

* The seat of the Washbourne family had been for well over 200 years at this point (c. 1446), the Manor House located …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alianor de Washbourne於1449年出生在英國武斯特斯爾維其福德時，她的父親Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire11446歲，母親Elizabeth Knivton30歲。她於1467年11月26日與Sir Richard le Scrope在英國英格蘭越可爾黑利福 赫頓結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1505年12月在英國武斯特斯爾享年56歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可諾維其。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alianor de Washbourne于1449年出生在英国武斯特斯爾維其福德时，她的父亲Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire11446岁，母亲Elizabeth Knivton30岁。她于1467年11月26日与Sir Richard le Scrope在英国英格兰越可爾黑利福 赫頓结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1505年12月在英国武斯特斯爾享年56岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可諾維其。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Washbourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucs) or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The variant Washburn could also be from Washburn (WR Yorks), but there is comparatively little evidence that this place yielded a surname.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: Alianor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmelo, Carmine, Paolo, Pasquale, Santo.
Italian (southern): habitational name from a place called Aliano, in Matera province, Basilicata.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alianor de Washbourne was born in 1449, in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, her father, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, was 11446 and her mother, Elizabeth Knivton, was 30. She married Sir Richard le Scrope on 26 November 1467, in Sheriff Hutton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in December 1505, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Norwich, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alianor de Washbourne est née en 1449, à Wichenford, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, avait 11446 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Knivton, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard le Scrope le 26 novembre 1467, à Sheriff Hutton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en décembre 1505, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Norwich, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alianor de Washbourne 1449 in Wichenford, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire 11446 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Knivton 30. Sie hat am 26. November 1467 in Sheriff Hutton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard le Scrope geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Dezember 1505 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Worcestershire, England und wurde in Norwich, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alianor de Washbourne è nata il nel 1449 nel Wichenford, Worcestershire, England, sua padre, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, aveva 11446 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Knivton, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard le Scrope il 26 novembre 1467, nel Sheriff Hutton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel dicembre 1505, nel Worcestershire, England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Norwich, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alianor de Washbourneが1449年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアウィチェンフォードで生まれた時，父Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershireは11446歳，母Elizabeth Knivtonは30歳であった。1467年11月26日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアシェリッフ ハットオンでSir Richard le Scropeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1505年12月にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで56歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクノーウィチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alianor de Washbourne(이)가 1449년 영국 워스스터실르 위천퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire(은)는 11446세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Knivton(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1467년 11월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 셔이프 후턴에서 Sir Richard le Scrope(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 12월 영국 워스스터실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 노위치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alianor de Washbourne nasceu em 1449, em Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, tinha 11446 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Knivton, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard le Scrope em 26 de novembro de 1467, em Sheriff Hutton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1505, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alianor de Washbourne родилась в 1449 г. в местности вичэнфорд, ворсестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire было 11446 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Knivton, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard le Scrope 26 ноября 1467 г. в местности ширифф хуттон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла декабрь 1505 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности норвич, норфолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alianor de Washbourne nació en 1449, en Wichenford, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Normon de Washburne Sheriff of Worcestershire, tenía 11446 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Knivton, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Richard le Scrope el 26 de noviembre de 1467, en Sheriff Hutton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en diciembre de 1505, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Norwich, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
